name: Lemon Delight Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Or use 2 8-ounce containers of Philadelphia soft cream cheese.
~--------------------------------------------------------------------------
Combine crumbs, sugar and margarine; reserve half. Press remaining mixture onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
Soften gelatin in water, stir over low heat until dissolved. Add lemon juice, egg yolks, and one-quarter cup sugar, cook stirring constantly over medium heat for five minutes. Gradually add to cream cheese, mixing at medium speed on electric mixer until well blended. Beat egg whites until foamy; gradually add remaining sugar beating until stiff peaks form. Fold into cream cheese mixture; pour over crust. Top with reserved crumbs; chill until firm.
